name: Tech and Energy Transition Corporation
summary: Tech and Energy Transition Corporation focuses on effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was formerly known as M Acquisition Company IV Corporation and changed its name to Tech and Energy Transition Corporation in December 2020. Tech and Energy Transition Corporation was incorporated in 2017 and is based in New York, New York.
